Antigravity Design Notes

Improvements Added: Official Walmart blue (#0071CE) and spark yellow (#FFC220) colors are applied. We've upgraded typography to Google Outfit (which mirrors the new "Everyday Sans" brand font) and improved spacing, line weights, and logo alignment.
